title: Adventuring Equipment
excerpt: How equipment can help adventurers explore.
markdown:
# Adventuring Equipment

As adventurers explore, their equipment can help them in many ways. See the Equipment section for rules on many items that are useful on adventures.

> > **Reaching New Places**Use a Ladder to access out-of-the-way locations or a Torch to perceive things in the dark.
>
> > **Overcoming Obstacles**Bypass locked doors and containers with Thieves' Tools or create hazards for pursuers with Caltrops.

> **Beyond the Battlefield:** The items in the Tools and Adventuring Gear sections are especially useful, but even weapons can be used for more than battle. For example, you could use a Quarterstaff to push a sinister-looking button you're reluctant to touch.
